channel.title: Networking on EasyFPGA
channel.description: Recent content in Networking on EasyFPGA

item.title: Ethernet II vs IEEE 802.3: Key Differences Explained
item.description: The 2-byte field at offset 12 in an Ethernet frame means completely different things in Ethernet II and IEEE 802.3 — here is why it matters.

item.title: Ethernet II + IPv4 + UDP Frame Structure Reference
item.description: A complete byte-level breakdown of an Ethernet II / IPv4 / UDP frame — the essential reference for FPGA-based network packet processing.
